title: [CI:DOCS] Update the Podman readme
body:
I noticed a large number of searches for Varlink on the Github page, and that the readme still called it out as our only supported API. This updates the readme to remove links to Varlink API documentation, and points to docs for the new HTTP API.

I also updated other parts to reflect the current direction the project is taking (Podman v2 and the HTTP API).
